context.question: Will the price of Bitcoin be above $70,000 on April 14?
context.market_title: Will the price of Bitcoin be above $70,000 on April 14?

decision.primary_crux: BTC being above $70,000 at the April 14 noon ET Binance minute is overwhelmingly likely because the same-venue morning price sat far above the strike, but the market's 99.95% price already assumes away almost all of the exact-minute, single-venue settlement tail that still remains until the resolving candle is actually observed.
secondary_cruxes: The directional question is basically settled; the only meaningful residual risk is mechanical and venue-specific.
The exact resolving Binance 12:00 ET candle was still not directly captured in the bounded synthesis materials.
At this price, even tiny operational or last-minute path tails matter more than broad BTC forecast skill.

valuation.compression_reason: The bounded evidence supports an overwhelming Yes probability, but the unobserved final resolving candle and residual single-minute Binance tail keep fair value slightly below the market's near-certainty pricing.

execution_semantics.time_horizon: Through the exact Binance 12:00 ET / 16:00 UTC settlement candle

portfolio_constraints: Do not initiate new exposure from this packet because the market is already beyond bounded fair value.
Existing aligned exposure may be held, but refresh on the exact resolving candle before any adjustment.
Treat same-minute venue-specific settlement markets as operational-risk contracts once price is this extreme.

bands.name: max_enter
bands.notes: No autonomous entry from this packet; materially cheaper pricing would require a fresh pre-noon venue check.

bands.name: scaled_enter
bands.notes: No entry authorized because the contract is already in tiny-tail operational-risk territory rather than directional-value territory.

bands.name: hold
bands.notes: Hold zone consistent with overwhelming Yes probability but no fresh-add edge.

bands.name: trim
bands.notes: Trim or avoid increasing as price approaches the upper end of justified fair value.

bands.name: exit
bands.notes: Exit/avoid at extreme prices because remaining value is dominated by exact-minute settlement and venue-specific anomaly risk.

thesis_breakers: A sharp late selloff materially compresses the cushion toward $70,000 before the noon ET minute.
Direct observation of the resolving Binance candle closes at or below $70,000.
Evidence emerges of a Binance-specific timestamp, print, or surface anomaly affecting the governing minute.
market_structure_breakers: The current quote is stale relative to the latest pre-noon Binance state.
UI-versus-API or surface-mapping differences prove material for the resolving candle.
Liquidity collapses or market mechanics make the displayed quote non-executable.
time_breakers: The exact resolving candle should replace this packet immediately once observed.
In the final minutes before noon ET, even small venue-specific changes can dominate all prior reasoning.
reversal_conditions: Move materially lower only on a fresh packet if BTC collapses sharply toward the threshold or a Binance-specific anomaly appears.
Do not auto-reverse from this packet.
Suspend action if the final candle source appears disputed.

key_uncertainties: The exact final Binance 12:00 ET candle close.
Whether any Binance-specific operational, timestamp, or UI/API anomaly affects the governing minute.
Residual intraday volatility over the final pre-noon window.
reasons_to_pass: The market is already essentially pricing certainty, leaving no actionable edge.
The missing exact resolving candle is now the only thing that matters economically.
Single-minute, single-venue markets should not be treated as free money even with a very large pre-noon cushion.
what_would_change_my_mind: Direct observation of the final Binance candle closing above $70,000 would collapse the remaining tail.
A sharp move toward the threshold before noon ET would lower fair value materially.
Evidence of a Binance-specific settlement anomaly would reduce confidence despite the large cushion.

audit.one_sentence_rationale: Bitcoin being above $70,000 at the April 14 noon ET Binance minute is overwhelmingly likely given the large same-venue pre-noon cushion, but because the market is already at 99.95% and the exact resolving candle was not directly observed, the disciplined posture is watch-only rather than chasing near-certainty.
audit.notes: This packet treats the case as directionally decided but not yet operationally closed; the only remaining uncertainty is narrow settlement-mechanics tail risk.
